parameterDefinitions.name: VPNG GREETING
parameterDefinitions.displayText: VPNG greeting (read by VPNG via $$get^VSLCFG at SYS)

parameterDefinitions.name: VSL TAP CAP
parameterDefinitions.displayText: Traffic-tap rolling-ring capacity (records); VSLTAP cap knob

parameterDefinitions.name: VSL TAP MAXBYTES
parameterDefinitions.displayText: Traffic-tap copy-cost ceiling (bytes); a larger record trips auto-failover OFF

parameterDefinitions.name: VSL TAP HBSTALE
parameterDefinitions.displayText: Traffic-tap heartbeat staleness bound (seconds) for the liveness check

parameterDefinitions.name: VSL TAP RETAIN
parameterDefinitions.displayText: Traffic-tap cache retain days (the ^XTMP Kernel auto-purge horizon)

parameterDefinitions.name: VSL TAP ALWAYSON
parameterDefinitions.displayText: Traffic-tap always-on flight-recorder opt-in (capture with no consumer present)

parameterDefinitions.name: VSL S3 ENDPOINT
parameterDefinitions.displayText: S3 endpoint override (empty=real AWS virtual-host; set=path-style S3-equivalent)

parameterDefinitions.name: VSL S3 BUCKET
parameterDefinitions.displayText: S3 target bucket for the traffic-tap egress

parameterDefinitions.name: VSL S3 REGION
parameterDefinitions.displayText: S3 region for SigV4 signing (e.g. us-gov-west-1 for GovCloud)

parameterDefinitions.name: VSL S3 PREFIX
parameterDefinitions.displayText: Per-station S3 key prefix (the §11 partition for fleet rollout)
